title: [test-soft-delete-behavior] Aggregate failure: test soft delete behavior (13/13 scenario checks failed) on n/a — aggregate finding across endpoints — expected All 13 'test soft delete behavior' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour, observed [api-tester-test-soft-delete-behavior] quality outcome=FAIL; metric=0.0 (undocumented)
expected: All 13 'test soft delete behavior' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour

testing_steps: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that sends DELETE http://localhost:8899/products/1 and captures the response body.
3. Assert the documented soft-delete markers (isDeleted: true, deletedOn timestamp), then GET /products/1 and assert the documented post-delete visibility.
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/test-soft-delete-behavior/cases.json — this run recorded 13 of 13 checks failing.
